title: No Rest
description: Prevents player sleeping but adds an Overworld Respawn Anchor to set your spawn point.
body: ## No Rest   ![https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-apii](https://i.imgur.com/VLsMyfv.png) **What does it do?** - It disables the use of a bed on the Overworld. - It adds an Overworld Respawn Anchor that charges with any food. - The allowed foods can be changed in the config file. --- **Recipe** --- **Other Mods** [You can find my other mods here.](https://modrinth.com/user/ShiftTheDev)
